messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0033",
  "title": "典型移动游戏产品案例分析：《杖剑传说》",
  "page_index": 32,
  "page_range": "32"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0034",
    "title": "基于项目组擅长品类精准挖掘出“轻度MMO”的细分蓝海赛道",
    "page_range": "32-33",
    "summary": "本章节可支持以下维度的检索问答：\n- **可回答主题**：游戏细分赛道定位策略、“轻度MMO”品类创新逻辑、产品商业化表现与市场分析。\n- **核心实体**：《杖剑传说》（游戏产品）、厦门吉比特网络技术股份有限公司（企业主体）、点点数据（数据提供方）、服务器分区（国服/繁中服/日服/三服合计）。\n- **关键时间**：2025年第三季度（财报周期）、2025年5月29日至12月31日（日流水统计区间）。\n- **概念定义**：“轻度MMO”指在放置游戏极简框架内，系统融入组队副本、职业分工、公会社交等MMO核心元素，兼顾社交成长深度与低日常负担的产品形态。\n- **核心主张**：该定位精准契合时间碎片化用户与泛用户需求，避开传统重度MMO红海，开辟竞争缓和的蓝海赛道；该产品是吉比特2025年Q3海外游戏业务营收同比大幅增长的主要贡献者。\n- **图表与指标**：包含“2025年《杖剑传说》全球日流水（万元）”折线图（按服务器维度展示趋势）；核心量化指标为海外游戏业务营收同比+59.46%。\n- **证据类型**：企业季度财务报告、第三方数据机构自主绘制图表、典型移动游戏产品案例分析。"
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0035",
    "title": "“放置为表、MMO为里“，并通过IP联动将两者紧密藕合",
    "page_range": "33-34",
    "summary": "This section answers retrieval queries regarding the mobile game 《杖剑传说》, structured around the following dimensions:\n\n- **Topics & Definitions:** Explains the “放置为表、MMO为里” (idle surface, MMO core) design philosophy, defining how vertical idle progression and light exploration/puzzle mechanics lower daily engagement barriers while embedding traditional MMORPG depth.\n- **Entities & Dates:** Identifies the game 《杖剑传说》 and its post-public-beta IP collaboration timeline: 蔬菜精灵 (launch sync), 为美好的世界献上祝福 (2 months post-launch), 洛天依 x 言和 (4 months post-launch), and 罗小黑战记2 (6 months post-launch). Notes the game has been in public beta for over half a year.\n- **Procedures & Mechanics:** Details gameplay loops including semi-real-time command queue combat, pre-configuration of 8 active/passive skills, equipment affix BD (build) construction, and the social progression path (independent idle grinding → team-dependent high-yield dungeons → guild participation → “veteran carry” culture).\n- **Claims & Metrics:** Asserts that MMO-style collaborative social systems are the primary drivers of player retention and revenue. Claims the pure 2D art style ensures high compatibility with ACG IPs, enabling rapid content deployment and effective fan conversion. Cites metrics: average collab frequency of every 2 months, 8 skill slots, and hundreds of skill combinations ensuring long-term explorability.\n- **Tables/Figures & Evidence Types:** Presents a chronological collaboration timeline table/figure mapping IP names to rollout intervals. Evidence is categorized as analytical industry research and gameplay feature breakdown, sourced from 点点数据 (DianDian Data) self-research and visualization."
  }
]

message.content: This section provides a retrieval-optimized case study analysis of the mobile game 《杖剑传说》, covering market positioning, core design mechanics, and commercial performance. **Topics & Definitions** explore the "light MMO" niche strategy and the "idle surface, MMO core" philosophy, defining the product as an idle-game framework integrated with traditional MMO elements (co-op dungeons, class roles, guild socials) to balance social depth with low daily engagement burdens. **Entities & Dates** focus on 《杖剑传说》 and publisher 厦门吉比特网络技术股份有限公司 (G-bits Network Technology), with key timeframes including Q3 2025 (financial reporting), a daily revenue tracking window from May 29 to December 31, 2025, and post-public beta IP collaboration milestones at launch, 2, 4, and 6 months (featuring IPs: 蔬菜精灵, 为美好的世界献上祝福, 洛天依 x 言和, 罗小黑战记2). **Procedures & Mechanics** detail gameplay loops including semi-real-time command queue combat, pre-configuration of 8 active/passive skills, equipment affix build (BD) construction, and a structured social progression path (independent idle grinding → team-dependent high-yield dungeons → guild participation → veteran carry culture). **Claims & Metrics** assert that the positioning successfully targets fragmented-time users while avoiding heavy MMO competition, and that MMO-style social systems combined with a pure 2D art style drive retention, revenue, and ACG IP fan conversion. Key metrics include a +59.46% YoY increase in overseas game revenue, an average IP collaboration frequency of every 2 months, 8 skill slots enabling hundreds of combinations, and server-specific daily revenue trends. **Tables, Figures & Evidence Types** feature a line chart tracking 2025 global daily revenue (in 10k RMB) across CN, Traditional Chinese, and JP servers, alongside a chronological table/figure mapping IP collaboration rollout intervals. Evidence is drawn from corporate quarterly financial reports, third-party market data (点点数据/DianDian Data), and analytical industry research on gameplay mechanics and commercialization.

Evidence is synthesized from corporate quarterly financial reports, third-party market data (点点数据/DianDian Data), and analytical industry research on gameplay mechanics and commercialization.
